questionHtml:
The diagram shows interactions between food chains in an ecosystem in the African savannah.

Which arrows indicate the flow of chemical energy?

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: The diagram shows interactions between food chains in an ecosystem in the African savannah. Which arrows indicate the flow of chemical energy? A. I and II only B. I and III only C.
